spatial_claims.source_phrase: city of Antiparah ... southern campaign theater involving ... Antiparah

spatial_claims.source_phrase: towards the wilderness which was west and north, away beyond the borders of the land ... until they had reached the wilderness, which was called Hermounts
spatial_claims.notes: The verse explicitly places Hermounts beyond the borders of the inhabited land; Zarahemla is the best-fit land frame from the battle context, while the west/north orientation is kept interpretive rather than encoded as separate hard geometry claims.

spatial_claims.source_phrase: land of Melek, on the west of the river Sidon

spatial_claims.source_phrase: departed out of the land of Jershon, and came over into the land of Melek

spatial_claims.source_phrase: traveled three days' journey on the north of the land of Melek; and he came to a city which was called Ammonihah
spatial_claims.notes: The text reaches the city after traveling north of Melek; this supports placing the Ammonihah land frame north of Melek, while keeping the city/land distinction cautious.

spatial_claims.source_phrase: city of Ammonihah ... thus it was with the land of Ammonihah
spatial_claims.notes: Same-name city/land pairing is strongly supported by the surrounding Alma 8 naming explanation.

spatial_claims.source_phrase: the city of Noah ... marched forward to the land of Noah

spatial_claims.source_phrase: the city of Noah ... become strong, yea, even to exceed the strength of the city Ammonihah

spatial_claims.source_phrase: land of Jershon ... joins the land Bountiful
spatial_claims.notes: Direct Jershon-Bountiful adjacency.
